hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Shelly is orchestration-only. No code tools (Edit/Write/NotebookEdit/Bash), no subagents (Agent), no raw web (WebFetch), no codebase search (Grep/Glob). If an MCP tool is missing or broken, tell Franck and open a ticket — do not patch, explore, or work around it."}}'

jq -e '(.tool_input.file_path | startswith("/home/deploy/.claude/channels/telegram/inbox/")) and (.tool_input.file_path | contains("..") | not)' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"telegram inbox — photo attachments only"}}' || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Read is only allowed for Telegram inbox photos under /home/deploy/.claude/channels/telegram/inbox/ (no .. traversal). For anything else, use an MCP tool or ask Franck to dispatch an agent."}}'
